title: Watch the total solar eclipse with ESA in León
summary: Discover the science behind one of nature's most extraordinary phenomena and experience a total solar eclipse with the European Space Agency (ESA), the City of León and the University of León.

title: ONERA Selects AMOS to Build French Space Surveillance Telescope
summary:
Belgium’s AMOS has been selected by the French aerospace research agency ONERA to build PROVIDENCE, a 2.5-metre ground-based telescope that will provide detailed images of satellites in low Earth orbit for the French Air and Space Force. The telescope is expected to enter service in early 2029. Preliminary studies for PROVIDENCE began in 2020, with […]

title: FCC approves sweeping space reforms while clearing more C-band for 5G
summary:
The FCC voted July 22 to push satellite operators out of more C-band spectrum for a 5G auction next year, while approving a licensing overhaul aimed at accelerating the commercial space economy.
The post FCC approves sweeping space reforms while clearing more C-band for 5G appeared first on SpaceNews.
